title: Instant PGV Map Predictor
description: Submission for Datahacks 2026. Web interactable interface to predict and make PGV maps for earthquakes based on user input.

title: Analysis of Customer Segmentation with RFM
description: Dashboard visualization and data analysis using various models and EDA for consumer dataset.

title: Analyzing Champion Impact in League of Legends Results
description: Data analysis and models determining and predicting the impact of champions in popular online game LOL.

title: Investigating the Effects of Smartphone App Usage on Mood and Behavior in Young Adults
description: Research, data visualization, and hypothesis testing investigating the impact of daily smartphone usage duration correlation with attention span in young adults aged 18 - 25.
